verdict.text: Maracay (Aragua) scores Avoid. The Aragua state capital is home to the Tren de Aragua gang, which has become one of the most internationally active criminal organisations in the Americas, with documented activity across 12+ countries. At the source in Aragua state, the gang presence is at its most concentrated. All three advisories cover Venezuela at maximum restriction.

reconciliation.text: Kidnapping, armed robbery, and murder at extreme rates. The Tren de Aragua operates with de facto territorial control in parts of Maracay and the wider Aragua state. Law enforcement is either unable or unwilling to challenge the group in its home territory.

Tren de Aragua's home base makes Maracay among the highest-risk cities on this list for any visitor. Do not travel. If compelled by family connections, consult a specialist security firm with Venezuelan ground operations before making any plans.
